column.text:
• St. Louis Cardinals placed 3B Ramón Urías on the 60-day injured list with right elbow lateral epicondylitis.
• Colorado Rockies transferred RHP Chase Dollander to the 60-day injured list with a right elbow strain.
• Kansas City Royals placed RHP Seth Lugo on the 7-day injured list with a concussion.
• Toronto Blue Jays designated C Tyler Heineman for assignment.
• Houston Astros designated RHP Ryan Weiss for assignment.
• Athletics placed DH Brent Rooker on the 10-day injured list with a left knee bone bruise.
• Toronto Blue Jays placed CF Daulton Varsho on the 10-day injured list with left wrist inflammation.
• Detroit Tigers activated RHP Kenley Jansen from the 15-day injured list.
• Arizona Diamondbacks activated LF Jordan Lawlar from the 60-day injured list.
• Tampa Bay Rays sent RF Jonny DeLuca on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Durham.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
x_article.body:

• Kansas City Royals placed RHP Seth Lugo on the 7-day injured list with a concussion.

• Houston Astros designated RHP Ryan Weiss for assignment.
• Athletics placed DH Brent Rooker on the 10-day injured list with a left knee bone bruise.
• Toronto Blue Jays placed CF Daulton Varsho on the 10-day injured list with left wrist inflammation.
• Detroit Tigers activated RHP Kenley Jansen from the 15-day injured list.
• Arizona Diamondbacks activated LF Jordan Lawlar from the 60-day injured list.
• Tampa Bay Rays sent RF Jonny DeLuca on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Durham.
